title: Sara discovers chocolate footprint
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister
prompt: Two-shot in @Livingroom. @Sara on the LEFT crouching pointing at a chocolate paw-print on the wood floor: "A clue! Look — a chocolate footprint!" @Eva on the RIGHT leaning in: "Really? Really-really? Whose foot is that small?"
